description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Sync Tensorflow models to Proxmox VM that runs on push to master, deploy-* branches, and tags matching v*.*.*. The workflow consists of two jobs: tfmodels-sync and keras-category-classifier-sync. The tfmodels-sync job runs on ubuntu-latest, syncs Tensorflow models to a Proxmox VM using SSH, and downloads models from GitHub releases. The keras-category-classifier-sync job runs on ubuntu-latest, syncs Keras category classifier configs to a Proxmox VM using SSH, and downloads configs from GitHub releases.
